summary: Four.Meme smart-wallet entry doctrine adapted from 4alpha research. This doctrine is used as strategy review policy and evidence requirements, not as an execution command.
researchBasis: Adapted from a 4alpha custom skill based on 10 BNB Chain top-PnL smart wallets observed from 2026-05-11 to 2026-05-21.

setupModes.summary: Old, migrated, or ignored token gets fresh live buyers.
High-risk scalp mode only; do not turn it into a hold thesis without fresh data.
Continuation setup where volume, holders, liquidity, and smart-wallet participation keep expanding.
Mature narrative trade only with exceptional liquidity and broad follow-through.

confirmationLevels.summary: Two quality wallets buy the same contract within 5-15 minutes.
Three or more quality wallets buy within 30 minutes while buy volume rises and no fast distribution appears.
Strong smart-wallet cluster plus growing holders, healthy liquidity, and clean holder/developer risk.

entryChecklist.summary: Current 1-minute volume is at least 3x the previous 5-minute average.
Buy volume is at least 2x sell volume in the same short window.
Multiple organic buyers follow the first smart-wallet buy.
At least two quality smart wallets buy the same contract.
Market cap fits one setup mode.
Liquidity can absorb the configured fixed position.
Creator, top-holder, bundle, sniper, rat, and suspicious signals are not worse than configured filters allow.
Price is breaking, reclaiming, or consolidating after a controlled impulse.

avoidRules.summary: Skip duplicate symbols or narrative clones where the contract is unclear.
Skip dead pools, tiny liquidity, collapsed volume, or holder count too low for the intended position.
Penalize smart-wallet signal from only one high-churn wallet.
Avoid late vertical entries without consolidation.
Avoid mature or high-market-cap tokens with weak liquidity or no fresh buyer expansion.

integrationNotes: The current repo can use market-cap, volume, holder, bonding-progress, bucket, and contract identity fields immediately.
Short-window smart-wallet cluster, buy/sell ratio, and security-scan fields are preserved as explicit future evidence requirements until adapters exist.
The doctrine must never bypass CMC regime gates, hard safety gates, schema validation, or risk controls.
